instruction: Classify the contract clause into its clause type.
baseline_prompt: You are a contract-clause classifier. Classify the contract clause into its clause type. Classify into one of these categories: indemnification, termination, confidentiality, governing_law, limitation_of_liability, payment_terms.
source: Authored for TEI-Bench (Sonnet-generated, Sonnet-validated; kept only label-agreed examples).

train.query: The Borrower hereby agrees to fully compensate and hold the Lender harmless from any and all losses, damages, claims, actions, and expenses, including but not limited to attorney's fees, that the Lender may sustain or incur as a consequence of any misrepresentation or breach of warranty made by the Borrower in connection with this loan agreement.

This Agreement shall continue in perpetuity unless and until one party provides the other with no less than forty-five (45) days written notice of its intention to conclude the contractual relationship.

Any technical data, software code, algorithms, or documentation provided under this agreement remains the exclusive property of the disclosing party and must not be copied, reproduced, or shared without explicit written authorization.

This Contract and any disputes or claims arising out of or in connection with it shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Province of Ontario and the federal laws of Canada applicable therein.

The parties agree that recovery shall be limited to actual damages sustained and proven, excluding any claims for lost profits, diminution in value, or other economic losses, with a ceiling of two hundred thousand dollars ($200,000).
Consultant's hourly rate is set at $185 per hour, with invoices submitted bi-weekly. Reimbursable expenses exceeding $500 require prior written approval and must be accompanied by original receipts.

Vendor shall assume full responsibility for and shall defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Purchaser from any liability, loss, damage, or expense including reasonable legal fees that may result from the Vendor's violation of any applicable environmental laws, regulations, or permits in the course of providing services.

The Service Provider may immediately suspend or end all services under this contract if the Client engages in any illegal activity, violates acceptable use policies, or poses a security risk to the Provider's systems.

Employee agrees that all customer data, unpublished research, internal communications, and business methods learned during employment constitute confidential information and shall not be disclosed or exploited for personal gain.

This Contract shall in all respects be subject to and interpreted according to the laws of Switzerland, specifically excluding the United Nations Convention on Contracts for the International Sale of Goods.
Under no circumstances will the Service Provider be liable to Client for damages exceeding three times the monthly service fee paid in the month immediately preceding the claim.
Annual licensing fees totaling $50,000 are payable in equal quarterly installments of $12,500 each, due on the first business day of January, April, July, and October.

Distributor agrees to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless Manufacturer from all third-party claims for personal injury, property damage, or economic loss arising from Distributor's storage, handling, marketing, distribution, or resale of the products after delivery by Manufacturer.

The Company reserves the right to immediately cease all Services and cancel this contract without prior notice in the event that the Client fails to make payment within sixty (60) days of the invoice due date.

The parties acknowledge that disclosure of sensitive commercial information could cause irreparable harm and therefore agree to take all necessary precautions to safeguard such information from unauthorized release or publication.

test.query: This Agreement shall be construed and enforced in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware, without regard to its conflict of laws provisions.
The maximum amount recoverable by Licensee from Licensor for all claims combined shall be limited to the license fees paid in the six months prior to the first event giving rise to such claims.
The purchase price of $250,000 shall be paid as follows: (i) $75,000 deposit upon signing; (ii) $100,000 upon substantial completion; and (iii) $75,000 within 15 days of final inspection approval.

The Company undertakes to reimburse and protect the Executive from any losses, expenses, or liabilities (including reasonable attorney's fees) that the Executive may incur in connection with any action, suit, or proceeding arising out of the Executive's performance of duties on behalf of the Company, except where such actions constitute willful misconduct or gross negligence.
This Agreement shall automatically expire on December 31, 2025, unless earlier terminated in accordance with the provisions set forth herein or extended by mutual written consent of both parties.

Consultant acknowledges that during the engagement, they may have access to sensitive materials including financial records, product designs, and strategic plans, all of which must be kept strictly private and not shared with any external entities.
This Agreement is made under and shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Federal Republic of Germany.

In no event shall either party be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to loss of profits, revenue, data, or use, whether in an action in contract or tort, even if such party has been advised of the possibility of such damages.

The total contract value of $1.2 million shall be distributed across 24 monthly payments of $50,000 each, commencing on the first day of the month following system deployment and continuing for the duration of the term.

Licensee shall be solely responsible for and shall indemnify, defend, and hold Licensor harmless from and against any claims, suits, losses, damages, costs, fees, and expenses arising out of or relating to any allegations that the Licensee's modifications to the licensed materials violate any applicable laws or regulations.

Upon dissolution, bankruptcy, or insolvency proceedings initiated by or against either party, the non-affected party may immediately discontinue performance under this Agreement by providing written notification.

All information marked as 'Proprietary' or 'Confidential' exchanged between the parties shall be protected with the same degree of care used to protect each party's own sensitive information, but in no case less than reasonable care.

All matters arising out of or relating to this Agreement are governed by and construed in accordance with the internal laws of the State of California without giving effect to any choice or conflict of law provision or rule.
Except for breaches of confidentiality obligations, the liability of either party for any claim shall be capped at the lesser of actual damages proven or one million dollars ($1,000,000).

The Client shall remit compensation within thirty (30) days following receipt of invoice. All invoices shall be submitted monthly and include detailed breakdowns of services rendered during the billing period.

Tenant shall indemnify Landlord from and against all liabilities, claims, suits, costs, expenses, damages, or judgments arising from injuries to persons or damage to property occurring in or about the leased premises to the extent caused by any act, omission, or negligence of Tenant or Tenant's agents, employees, or invitees.

In the event of a Force Majeure condition lasting more than six (6) consecutive months, either party may elect to discontinue this Agreement without penalty by providing written notice to the other party.

The Receiving Party agrees not to disclose any proprietary information, trade secrets, or business data received from the Disclosing Party to any third parties without prior written consent, except as required by law.

Each party irrevocably agrees that the courts of New South Wales, Australia shall have exclusive jurisdiction to settle any dispute arising out of or in connection with this Agreement and that the laws of New South Wales shall govern.

Notwithstanding anything to the contrary in this Agreement, Provider's liability shall be limited to direct damages only and shall not exceed the total amount paid by Customer in the preceding calendar year.
All amounts owed under this contract shall be paid via wire transfer to the account specified in Exhibit B. Payments received after the 15th of the month will incur a 2% surcharge.

Supplier agrees to indemnify and hold Client harmless from any third-party claims alleging that the delivered software infringes upon any patent, copyright, trademark, or trade secret, and shall pay all damages, costs, and attorney fees finally awarded against Client in connection with any such claim.

Either party shall have the right to withdraw from this Agreement for convenience by providing one hundred twenty (120) days prior written notice, with all pending obligations to be fulfilled before the effective cessation date.

The obligations set forth in this section shall survive termination of the agreement and continue for a period of three years, during which time all confidential materials must be returned or destroyed upon request.
